response.justification: Sarah Smith brings a long, broad engineering career with genuine high-throughput distributed systems experience and strong full-stack fundamentals, but the resume shows no meaningful exposure to the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or growth engineering. The current staff-level scope aligns closer to IC4/IC5 than the IC6 Principal level required, and there is no evidence of cross-team architectural influence at enterprise scale. The recent AI tooling work at re:cinq is a positive signal but does not compensate for the absence of experimentation-domain depth.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby, demonstrating production scale competence
Polyglot background spanning TypeScript, C, C++, Java, and DLang with full-stack range across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the AI-first engineering context of the role
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical and data analysis background, all of which are central requirements for this role
Titles and scope of work suggest IC4/IC5 seniority with no demonstrated cross-team architectural leadership or principal-level influence

key_factors.factor: Absent telemetry and metrics infrastructure background
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby
